title: fix bug dest path when COPY .dockerignore
body:
Fix the destination file path if .dockerignore is not empty. Avoid copying the source directory level into the container.
close #1530 
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @QiWang19 looks like this change upset prior dockerignore tests.

Thanks for the bugfix!
At the moment, I have podman 1.3.0-1~dev~ubuntu18.04~ppa17 and buildah 1.8-1~dev~ubuntu18.04~ppa25 from the Project Atomic PPA which were built shortly before the bugfix.
Will verify as soon as new versions are available.
